title: Verify the presence of the 'About' and 'STATS' options in the header
test_steps: Open the Earthquake Alert app. | Navigate to the promotional section. | Verify the presence of the 'About' and 'STATS' options in the header.
expected_result: The 'About' and 'STATS' options are visible in the header.

title: Click on the 'About' option in the header
test_steps: Open the Earthquake Alert app. | Navigate to the promotional section. | Click on the 'About' option in the header.
expected_result: The app should navigate to the 'About' section.

title: Click on the 'STATS' option in the header
test_steps: Open the Earthquake Alert app. | Navigate to the promotional section. | Click on the 'STATS' option in the header.
expected_result: The app should navigate to the 'STATS' section.

title: Verify the presence of the 'Author Apps' section
test_steps: Open the Earthquake Alert app. | Navigate to the promotional section. | Verify the presence of the 'Author Apps' section.

title: Click on the 'Draft Punk' app listing
test_steps: Open the Earthquake Alert app. | Navigate to the promotional section. | Click on the 'Draft Punk' app listing.
expected_result: The app should navigate to the 'Draft Punk' app page.

title: Click on the 'Border Wait' app listing
test_steps: Open the Earthquake Alert app. | Navigate to the promotional section. | Click on the 'Border Wait' app listing.
expected_result: The app should navigate to the 'Border Wait' app page.

title: Click on the 'GET IT ON GOOGLE PLAY' button for 'Draft Punk'
test_steps: Open the Earthquake Alert app. | Navigate to the promotional section. | Click on the 'Draft Punk' app listing. | Click on the 'GET IT ON GOOGLE PLAY' button for 'Draft Punk'.
expected_result: The user should be redirected to the Google Play Store to download the 'Draft Punk' app.
